author: kevaundray
content:
Yeah would suggest we write an issue detailing the design space and then making a decision to make progress.

 <@402080271563751435> was you leaning towards having the EL always be there or making it highly recommended?

author: taulepton_
content: Upon reflection I think it's best to keep the EL as required as it is the more conservative approach and better fit for a proposal. This also means less diff and clean isolation in the specs. I would then defer to ACD if they want to change it to optional.

author: taulepton_
content: I think we need to build up evidence of stable devnets with real proofs before we change this.

author: taulepton_
content: But client teams can easily support no EL mode if they wish. We are supporting no EL in `eth-act/lighthouse`.

author: kevaundray
content: sounds good -- could we make an issue for this on consensus-specs?
